parameters.query:
INSERT INTO earnings_calls (company_name, ticker, call_date, fiscal_quarter, fiscal_year, call_type, raw_transcript, transcript_source, word_count, processing_status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.company_name }}',
  '{{ $json.ticker }}',
  '{{ $json.call_date }}'::DATE,
  '{{ $json.fiscal_quarter }}',
  {{ $json.fiscal_year || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.call_type }}',
  '{{ $json.transcript_text }}',
  '{{ $json.transcript_source }}',
  {{ $json.word_count }},
  'processing'
)
RETURNING id, company_name, ticker, fiscal_quarter;

INSERT INTO transcript_sections (earnings_call_id, section_type, speaker_name, speaker_role, speaker_firm, section_text, section_order)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.earnings_call_id }}'::UUID,
  '{{ $json.label || $json.section_type }}',
  {{ $json.speaker_name ? "'" + $json.speaker_name + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.speaker_role || "Other" }}',
  {{ $json.speaker_firm ? "'" + $json.speaker_firm + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.content || $json.section_text }}',
  {{ $json.section_order }}
)
RETURNING id, section_type, speaker_role;

INSERT INTO guidance_signals (
  earnings_call_id, claim_id, claim_type, claim_text, claim_summary,
  direction, direction_confidence, change_description,
  transcript_citation, citation_speaker, citation_section,
  metric_name, metric_value_current, metric_value_prior, metric_unit, metric_period,
  schema_valid, validation_errors, falsification_flag, falsification_reason
)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.earnings_call_id }}'::UUID,
  '{{ $json.claim_id }}',
  '{{ $json.claim_type || "guidance" }}',
  '{{ $json.claim_text || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.claim_summary || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.direction || "unchanged" }}',
  {{ $json.direction_confidence || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.change_description || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.transcript_citation || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.citation_speaker || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.citation_section || "prepared_remarks" }}',
  NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
  {{ $json.schema_valid || false }},
  '[]'::JSONB,
  {{ $json.falsification_flag || false }},
  NULL
WHERE '{{ $json.claim_id }}' != 'undefined' AND '{{ $json.guidance_signals_empty }}' != 'true'
ON CONFLICT (claim_id) DO UPDATE
  SET direction = EXCLUDED.direction,
      direction_confidence = EXCLUDED.direction_confidence,
      transcript_citation = EXCLUDED.transcript_citation
RETURNING id, claim_id, direction, falsification_flag;

INSERT INTO risk_admissions (
  earnings_call_id, claim_id, risk_category, risk_text, risk_summary,
  severity, uncertainty_language, transcript_citation, citation_speaker,
  is_new_risk, schema_valid
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.earnings_call_id }}'::UUID,
  '{{ $json.claim_id }}',
  '{{ $json.risk_category || "operational" }}',
  '{{ $json.risk_text }}',
  '{{ $json.risk_summary || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.severity || "low" }}',
  ARRAY[]::TEXT[],
  '{{ $json.transcript_citation }}',
  '{{ $json.citation_speaker || "" }}',
  {{ $json.is_new_risk !== false }},
  {{ $json.schema_valid || false }}
)
ON CONFLICT (claim_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, claim_id, severity;

INSERT INTO qa_pressure_map (
  earnings_call_id, question_topic, question_text,
  analyst_name, analyst_firm, times_asked, asked_by_firms,
  response_type, response_text, response_summary,
  is_repeated_topic, pressure_score, schema_valid
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.earnings_call_id }}'::UUID,
  '{{ $json.question_topic || "General" }}',
  '{{ $json.question_text || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.analyst_name || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.analyst_firm || "" }}',
  {{ $json.times_asked || 1 }},
  ARRAY[]::TEXT[],
  '{{ $json.response_type || "answered" }}',
  '{{ $json.response_text || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.response_summary || "" }}',
  {{ $json.is_repeated_topic || false }},
  {{ $json.pressure_score || 5 }},
  false
)
RETURNING id, question_topic, pressure_score;

INSERT INTO agent_run_log (earnings_call_id, run_type, model_used, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, success)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Set Call Context').first().json.earnings_call_id }}'::UUID,
  'risk_extract',
  'llama-3.3-70b-versatile',
  0,
  0,
  true
);

SELECT 
  ec.id as earnings_call_id,
  ec.company_name,
  ec.ticker,
  ec.fiscal_quarter,
  json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object(
    'claim_id', gs.claim_id,
    'claim_summary', gs.claim_summary,
    'direction', gs.direction,
    'direction_confidence', gs.direction_confidence,
    'change_description', gs.change_description,
    'metric_name', gs.metric_name,
    'metric_value_current', gs.metric_value_current,
    'falsification_flag', gs.falsification_flag
  )) FILTER (WHERE gs.id IS NOT NULL) as guidance_signals,
  json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object(
    'claim_id', ra.claim_id,
    'risk_category', ra.risk_category,
    'risk_summary', ra.risk_summary,
    'severity', ra.severity,
    'is_new_risk', ra.is_new_risk
  )) FILTER (WHERE ra.id IS NOT NULL) as risk_admissions,
  json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object(
    'question_topic', qa.question_topic,
    'times_asked', qa.times_asked,
    'response_type', qa.response_type,
    'pressure_score', qa.pressure_score
  )) FILTER (WHERE qa.id IS NOT NULL) as qa_pressure_map
FROM earnings_calls ec
LEFT JOIN guidance_signals gs ON gs.earnings_call_id = ec.id
LEFT JOIN risk_admissions ra ON ra.earnings_call_id = ec.id
LEFT JOIN qa_pressure_map qa ON qa.earnings_call_id = ec.id
WHERE ec.id = '{{ $('Set Call Context').first().json.earnings_call_id }}'::UUID
GROUP BY ec.id, ec.company_name, ec.ticker, ec.fiscal_quarter;

INSERT INTO call_summaries (
  earnings_call_id, guidance_strengthened, guidance_weakened,
  guidance_unchanged, new_signals, retracted_signals,
  top_pressure_topics, new_risks, overall_tone, tone_confidence,
  narrative_summary, what_changed, what_didnt_change,
  contradiction_flags, schema_valid
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.earnings_call_id }}'::UUID,
  '[]'::JSONB,
  '[]'::JSONB,
  '[]'::JSONB,
  '[]'::JSONB,
  '[]'::JSONB,
  '[]'::JSONB,
  '[]'::JSONB,
  '{{ $json.overall_tone || "neutral" }}',
  {{ $json.tone_confidence || 0 }},
  'Summary generated',
  'See narrative_summary field',
  'See narrative_summary field',
  '[]'::JSONB,
  false
)
ON CONFLICT (earnings_call_id) DO UPDATE SET
  overall_tone = EXCLUDED.overall_tone,
  schema_valid = EXCLUDED.schema_valid
RETURNING id, earnings_call_id, overall_tone;

UPDATE earnings_calls SET 
  processing_status = 'complete',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.earnings_call_id }}'::UUID
RETURNING id, company_name, ticker, fiscal_quarter, processing_status;

-- ============================================================
-- MYCROFT: Earnings Call Intelligence Agent
-- PostgreSQL Schema
-- ============================================================

-- Enable UUID generation
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp";

-- ============================================================
-- TABLE 1: earnings_calls
-- Master record for each processed transcript
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS earnings_calls (
    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    company_name        VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    ticker              VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
    call_date           DATE         NOT NULL,
    fiscal_quarter      VARCHAR(10),                    -- e.g. "Q3 2024"
    fiscal_year         INTEGER,
    call_type           VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT 'quarterly', -- quarterly | annual | special
    raw_transcript      TEXT         NOT NULL,
    transcript_source   VARCHAR(255),                   -- manual | api | scraped
    word_count          INTEGER,
    processing_status   VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending | processing | complete | failed
    processing_error    TEXT,
    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_earnings_calls_ticker      ON earnings_calls(ticker);
CREATE INDEX idx_earnings_calls_call_date   ON earnings_calls(call_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_earnings_calls_status      ON earnings_calls(processing_status);


-- ============================================================
-- TABLE 2: transcript_sections
-- Parsed sections of the transcript (CEO / CFO / QA / Other)
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcript_sections (
    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    earnings_call_id    UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES earnings_calls(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    section_type        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,   -- prepared_remarks | qa | opening | closing
    speaker_name        VARCHAR(255),
    speaker_role        VARCHAR(255),           -- CEO | CFO | Analyst | Moderator
    speaker_firm        VARCHAR(255),           -- for analyst Q&A
    section_text        TEXT NOT NULL,
    section_order       INTEGER,
    char_start          INTEGER,               -- character offset in raw transcript
    char_end            INTEGER,
    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_sections_call_id   ON transcript_sections(earnings_call_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_sections_type      ON transcript_sections(section_type);


-- ============================================================
-- TABLE 3: guidance_signals
-- Extracted management guidance statements (shared claims schema)
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS guidance_signals (
    id                      UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    earnings_call_id        UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES earnings_calls(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    section_id              UUID REFERENCES transcript_sections(id),

    -- Shared Claims Schema Fields
    claim_id                VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,  -- e.g. AAPL-Q3-2024-G001
    claim_type              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,          -- guidance | risk | outlook | metric
    claim_text              TEXT NOT NULL,                 -- verbatim or near-verbatim
    claim_summary           TEXT,                          -- 1-sentence normalized summary

    -- Guidance Direction (FALSIFICATION TARGET)
    direction               VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL           -- strengthened | unchanged | weakened | new | retracted
        CHECK (direction IN ('strengthened','unchanged','weakened','new','retracted')),
    direction_confidence    NUMERIC(3,2)                   -- 0.00 to 1.00
        CHECK (direction_confidence >= 0 AND direction_confidence <= 1),

    -- Prior Call Comparison
    prior_call_id           UUID REFERENCES earnings_calls(id),
    prior_claim_text        TEXT,                          -- what was said last quarter
    change_description      TEXT,                          -- explicit diff narrative

    -- Supporting Evidence
    transcript_citation     TEXT NOT NULL,                 -- exact quote from transcript
    citation_speaker        VARCHAR(255),
    citation_section        VARCHAR(50),

    -- Metric Extraction (if quantitative)
    metric_name             VARCHAR(255),                  -- "Revenue guidance" | "EPS range"
    metric_value_current    NUMERIC,
    metric_value_prior      NUMERIC,
    metric_unit             VARCHAR(50),                   -- "$B" | "%" | "units"
    metric_period           VARCHAR(50),                   -- "FY2025" | "Q4 2024"

    -- Schema Validity
    schema_valid            BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    validation_errors       JSONB,
    falsification_flag      BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,         -- true if direction is null or uncited
    falsification_reason    TEXT,

    created_at              TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_guidance_call_id       ON guidance_signals(earnings_call_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_guidance_direction     ON guidance_signals(direction);
CREATE INDEX idx_guidance_ticker        ON guidance_signals(claim_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_guidance_flagged       ON guidance_signals(falsification_flag);


-- ============================================================
-- TABLE 4: risk_admissions
-- Structured risk language extracted from transcript
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_admissions (
    id                      UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    earnings_call_id        UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES earnings_calls(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    section_id              UUID REFERENCES transcript_sections(id),

    claim_id                VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,   -- e.g. AAPL-Q3-2024-R001
    risk_category           VARCHAR(100),                  -- macro | competitive | regulatory | operational | financial
    risk_text               TEXT NOT NULL,
    risk_summary            TEXT,
    severity                VARCHAR(20)                    -- low | medium | high | critical
        CHECK (severity IN ('low','medium','high','critical')),
    uncertainty_language    TEXT[],                        -- array of hedging phrases found
    transcript_citation     TEXT NOT NULL,
    citation_speaker        VARCHAR(255),

    -- Is this new vs. previously disclosed?
    is_new_risk             BOOLEAN,
    prior_disclosure_call   UUID REFERENCES earnings_calls(id),

    schema_valid            BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    created_at              TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_risk_call_id       ON risk_admissions(earnings_call_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_risk_category      ON risk_admissions(risk_category);
CREATE INDEX idx_risk_severity      ON risk_admissions(severity);


-- ============================================================
-- TABLE 5: qa_pressure_map
-- Analyst question patterns and management response behavior
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS qa_pressure_map (
    id                      UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    earnings_call_id        UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES earnings_calls(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    section_id              UUID REFERENCES transcript_sections(id),

    question_topic          VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    question_text           TEXT,
    analyst_name            VARCHAR(255),
    analyst_firm            VARCHAR(255),
    times_asked             INTEGER DEFAULT 1,             -- how many analysts asked this topic
    asked_by_firms          TEXT[],                        -- array of analyst firms

    -- Response classification
    response_type           VARCHAR(50)                    -- answered | deflected | deferred | partial | acknowledged
        CHECK (response_type IN ('answered','deflected','deferred','partial','acknowledged')),
    response_text           TEXT,
    response_summary        TEXT,

    -- Pressure signal
    is_repeated_topic       BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,         -- asked in prior call too?
    prior_call_response     VARCHAR(50),                   -- how it was answered last time
    pressure_score          INTEGER                        -- 1-10, derived from repetition + analyst tier
        CHECK (pressure_score BETWEEN 1 AND 10),

    schema_valid            BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    created_at              TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_qa_call_id         ON qa_pressure_map(earnings_call_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_qa_topic           ON qa_pressure_map(question_topic);
CREATE INDEX idx_qa_response_type   ON qa_pressure_map(response_type);
CREATE INDEX idx_qa_pressure        ON qa_pressure_map(pressure_score);


-- ============================================================
-- TABLE 6: call_summaries
-- Final "What Changed / What Didn't" roll-up per call
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS call_summaries (
    id                      UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    earnings_call_id        UUID UNIQUE NOT NULL REFERENCES earnings_calls(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

    -- Structured delta summary
    guidance_strengthened   JSONB,   -- array of claim_ids that strengthened
    guidance_weakened       JSONB,   -- array of claim_ids that weakened
    guidance_unchanged      JSONB,   -- array of claim_ids unchanged
    new_signals             JSONB,   -- array of claim_ids that are new this quarter
    retracted_signals       JSONB,   -- array of claim_ids retracted vs prior

    -- Top pressure topics from QA
    top_pressure_topics     JSONB,   -- [{topic, times_asked, response_type}]

    -- New risks this call
    new_risks               JSONB,   -- array of risk_admission claim_ids

    -- Overall call tone
    overall_tone            VARCHAR(50),  -- bullish | neutral | cautious | defensive
    tone_confidence         NUMERIC(3,2),

    -- Contradiction flags for Resolver Agent
    contradiction_flags     JSONB,        -- pre-computed flags for Resolver Agent

    -- Full narrative summary
    narrative_summary       TEXT,
    what_changed            TEXT,
    what_didnt_change       TEXT,

    schema_valid            BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    generated_at            TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);


-- ============================================================
-- TABLE 7: agent_run_log
-- Audit trail for every agent execution
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_run_log (
    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
    earnings_call_id    UUID REFERENCES earnings_calls(id),
    run_type            VARCHAR(100),          -- section_parse | guidance_extract | risk_extract | qa_map | summary
    model_used          VARCHAR(100),
    prompt_tokens       INTEGER,
    completion_tokens   INTEGER,
    latency_ms          INTEGER,
    success             BOOLEAN,
    error_message       TEXT,
    raw_llm_response    TEXT,
    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_runlog_call_id ON agent_run_log(earnings_call_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_runlog_success ON agent_run_log(success);


-- ============================================================
-- HELPER: auto-update updated_at on earnings_calls
-- ============================================================
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    NEW.updated_at = NOW();
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE TRIGGER trg_earnings_calls_updated_at
    BEFORE UPDATE ON earnings_calls
    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
